picks.reasoning: Manchester United are in the thick of a Premier League title race and enter this fixture with high morale following a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Chelsea. Despite being outshot in that match, their defensive resilience and clinical nature are hallmarks of a title-contending side. Playing at Old Trafford, they are strong favourites against a Brentford side that, while capable, lacks the same high-stakes motivation. Ladbrokes have them at 54.1% implied; we assess their true probability at 62%, offering a solid 7.9% edge.
